headline: Tractor Supply: 3.2% Yield From Chicks, Feed, And More
summary: Tractor Supply stock is a "Buy" given its wide-moat growth, digital tailwinds, a 3.2% dividend, and shares below $40 fair value. Click to learn more about TSCO.
